Rapid Plan 50k – A Comprehensive Look
This article explains only how the Rapid Evaluation and Sim Funded account works – with the funded stage of the plan split into Account Parameters and Payouts.

March 20, 2026

Table of contents

My Funded Futures has adopted a streamlined approach to evaluations. Traders can now follow a standardized evaluation process on their path to simulated funding and live account trading. The evaluation rules remain consistent, regardless of the account type you choose.

Rapid Plan Evaluation Stage Account Parameters 

Parameters

Rapid - $50,000

Profit Target

$3,000

Maximum Loss Limit (EOD)

$2,000

Daily Loss Limit

None

Max Contract

5 mini / 50 micro

Consistency

50% (Eval Only)

Minimum Trading Days

2 Days

T1 News Trading

Yes

At My Funded Futures, we prioritize our traders by providing the most competitive pricing in the industry. Our evaluation costs are among the lowest, and at MFFU, there are absolutely no activation fees for any of our plans. 

1. Sim Funded Account Parameters

Account basics

- Initial Balance: $0

- Max Loss Distance: $2,000 from your equity high-water mark (HWM)

- Drawdown Type: Intra-day trailing

- Consistency Rule: None in Sim Funded

- Max Contracts: 5 minis / 50 micros

How the Max Loss works

- Your Max Loss trails your account equity high-water mark during the day.

- The distance between your HWM and the Max Loss Limit is always $2,000 while it’s moving.

- As you make profits, both your HWM and Max Loss move up.

- Click here for additional details on intraday drawdown. 

Max Loss Lock at $100

- Once your trailing Max Loss reaches $100, it locks there.

- From that point on, it does not trail anymore.

- You must always keep at least $100 in the account.

- If your balance goes below $100 → the account is breached.

News trading

- No T1 news trading is allowed on this Sim Funded account.

Contract limits

- You may trade up to 5 minis and/or 50 micros total. 

- Exceeding a total of 5 minis or its equivalent in micros (50 micros) can result in a breach of the trading account. 

2. Payouts on Sim Funded (Rapid)

Payout requirements

- Required Buffer: $2,100

- You must first build at least $2,100 in realized profits in the account before requesting any payout.

- Consistency Requirement: None (you don’t need to meet a consistency rule to get paid).

Timing & frequency

- Payout Frequency: Daily - every 24 hours

- Your first payout becomes available exactly 24 hours after your first trade on the Sim Funded account (as long as you meet the buffer and minimum).

Amounts & split

- Minimum Payout Request: $500

- Profit Split:

- 90% to the trader

- 10% to MyFundedFutures

That’s it – the Rapid Sim Funded stage is all about:

- Respecting the intraday trailing Max Loss that eventually locks at $100, and

- Building up your $2,100 buffer so you can take fast, daily payouts under the 90/10 split.

Read all about the Transition to Live Parameters here
